We recommend that Management create an Internal Audit Service (IAS) Unit that would handle internal control functions of the agency pursuant to the above-mentioned rules and regulations. Refer to the PGIAM and the NGICS as guide in strengthening the internal control system of the LGU.

We recommend that management prioritize and consider filling-up of the vacant positions to enhance its services to attain full implementation of programs, plans and activities of the local government unit for the optimal benefit of the constituents.

We recommend that the management require:

The Municipal Planning and Development Council (MPDC) to judiciously and meticulously plan projects/programs/activities (PPAs) to be included in the Local Development Plan and Annual Investment Plan indicating in details specific PPAs of the 20% LDF in order to optimize the delivery of basic services to the people;
b.	the officers/personnel concerned to conduct in-depth analysis and ensure that Program of Works (POW) have been prepared in order to ascertain a more realistic estimates of work items and costs as basis in appropriating fund thereof; and,
c.	submit explanation on the non-implementation of development projects identified in the 2018 AIP.
